product_overview: A React + Supabase web app for browsing a book library, reading EPUBs in an authenticated reader, and managing user profiles, notifications and group access.
core_goals: Provide secure email/password authentication for users.
Allow users to browse a discoverable book library and view book details.
Enable authenticated users to read EPUB books in an in-app reader.
Support user profile viewing and editing, notifications, and user settings.
Enforce group gates and admin controls for restricted content or actions.
Expose a privacy policy and basic public member profiles.

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Allow users to sign in or register with email and password and access authenticated areas.
user_flows: Navigate to /auth -> Fill email input -> Fill password input -> Click sign in or sign up -> See redirect to /profile
Navigate to /auth -> Fill email input -> Fill password input -> Click sign in or sign up -> See error message 'Invalid credentials' -> Stay on /auth

features.name: Book Library (Home)
features.description: Show a scrollable list of books on the home page and allow users to open book details.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Scroll through book list -> Click on a book to view details -> See /book/:bookId page with book metadata
Navigate to / -> Scroll through book list -> Click on a book to view details -> See network error message -> Stay on /

features.name: Book Detail
features.description: Display detailed metadata for a selected book and allow users to start reading (reader is restricted to authenticated users).
user_flows: Navigate to /book/:bookId -> See book detail page with metadata and Read button -> Click Read button -> If authenticated navigate to /reader/:bookId -> See book open in reader
Navigate to /book/:bookId -> Click Read button -> Redirect to /auth -> Fill email input -> Fill password input -> Click sign in or sign up -> Redirect to /reader/:bookId

features.name: EPUB Reader
features.description: Authenticated EPUB reader to read book content with navigation controls and close/return behavior.
user_flows: Navigate to /reader/:bookId (authenticated) -> See EPUB content load -> Use reader controls (next/previous/seek) -> Click Close -> Redirect to /book/:bookId
Navigate to /reader/:bookId (unauthenticated) -> Redirect to /auth -> See message 'Login required' -> Stay on /auth

features.name: Profile Management
features.description: View the signed-in user's profile and edit personal details on a dedicated edit page.
user_flows: Navigate to /profile (authenticated) -> See user profile details -> Click Edit -> Navigate to /edit-profile -> Update fields -> Click Save -> See updated profile on /profile
Navigate to /profile (unauthenticated) -> Redirect to /auth -> See 'Login required' message

features.name: Edit Profile Validation
features.description: Validate and persist user profile edits; surface validation or save errors.
user_flows: Navigate to /edit-profile (authenticated) -> Update fields with valid data -> Click Save -> See success confirmation -> Redirect to /profile
Navigate to /edit-profile (authenticated) -> Update fields with invalid data -> Click Save -> See validation error message -> Stay on /edit-profile

features.name: Notifications
features.description: Show user notifications and allow users to view and mark them as read.
user_flows: Navigate to /notifications (authenticated) -> See list of notifications -> Click a notification -> See notification details -> Mark as read -> Notification marked read
Navigate to /notifications -> See 'Failed to load notifications' error -> Show Retry button

features.name: Settings
features.description: User settings page to view and modify account preferences.
user_flows: Navigate to /settings (authenticated) -> Toggle a setting -> Click Save -> See confirmation message 'Settings saved'
Navigate to /settings -> Toggle a setting -> Click Save -> See 'Failed to save settings' error -> Stay on /settings

features.name: Group Join Gate
features.description: Gate access for group-restricted content or membership and provide a join flow.
user_flows: Navigate to /join -> See group gate information -> Click Join group -> If allowed see confirmation -> Redirect to /profile
Navigate to /join -> Click Join group -> See 'Access denied' message -> Show link to contact admin

features.name: Admin Panel
features.description: Admin-only area for managing site content and users; non-admins are denied access.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin (authenticated as admin) -> See admin controls -> Perform admin action (e.g., remove book) -> See success message
Navigate to /admin (authenticated as non-admin) -> See 'Insufficient permissions' message -> Redirect to /

features.name: Member Profile (Public)
features.description: View another member's public profile page and interact (follow/contact) where allowed.
user_flows: Navigate to /members/:userId -> See member's public profile -> Click Follow -> See follow confirmation
Navigate to /members/:userId -> See 'Member not found' or network error -> Show back link to /

features.name: Privacy Page
features.description: Display the site's privacy policy to all visitors.
user_flows: Navigate to /privacy -> See privacy policy content
Navigate to /privacy -> See 'Page failed to load' error -> Show Retry option

features.name: User Authentication
user_interactions: Click sign in or sign up

features.name: Book Library
features.description: View list of books on the home page
user_interactions: Click on a book to view details
